chat_webhook_step1: Confirm the OpenClaw channel plugin is installed: ls ~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-channel/
chat_webhook_step2: Confirm the gateway is running: openclaw gateway status
chat_webhook_step3: Retrieve credentials from the gateway log: cat /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-*.log | grep -i \"eclaw.*bound\"
chat_webhook_step5: Allow gateway tools: openclaw config set gateway.tools.allow '[\"sessions_send\",\"sessions_spawn\",\"session_status\"]'
chat_webhook_step7: Test push: send a message from the EClaw app and confirm the bot receives it.
